hero.title: Engineering Systems That Scale

services.description: Six practice areas. Setlhopha se le sengwe. Every layer of your technology stack — from edge devices to enterprise dashboards.

customSoftware.description: Ditiriso tsa segompieno tse di agilweng ka microservices, APIs, le cloud-native architecture.

cta.title: Let's Make A Serious Thing ke gane
cta.description: From custom software development and AI-powered solutions to cloud infrastructure and automation — we deliver end-to-end technology services tailored to your requirements.

credibility.subtitle: Rekoto ya Rona
credibility.title: Tshepiso Mokoena, <gradient></gradient> Tshepiso
credibility.description: Go tswa kwa Sarajevo go ya kwa Oslo, Amsterdam le Berlin. Dithulaganyo tsa kgwebo di tla tshwarwa ka nako, nako nngwe le nngwe.

atlascopco.label: Cloud IAM for Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Architected the first-ever cloud-based One Identity infrastructure for Atlas Copco on Azure Kubernetes, reducing costs while maintaining enterprise compliance.

orange.label: Orange Cyberdefense Platform
orange.outcome: Developed Azure Kubernetes infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and custom ServiceNow integration for Europe's leading cybersecurity firm.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Built GIS platform mapping underground utilities across Germany with collision detection preventing multi-million Euro infrastructure damage.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub e laola diketekete tsa didiriswa, Synapse e baakanya dibilione tsa mela ya telemetry, ka edge aggregation e fokotsa ditshenyegelo tsa melaetsa ka ~90%.

drone.label: Autonomous Drone Platform
drone.outcome: Custom flight controller with 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub bridge enabling autonomous BVLOS flights for agricultural monitoring and payload delivery.

payment.label: Payment System Rescue
payment.outcome: Rescued failing payment gateway for Norwegian mobile app by reverse-engineering undocumented legacy code. Zero payment downtime post-modernization.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Built Maya plugin that cut 3D modeling and animation time by 50% at a major AAA studio, adopted as a standard tool in the production pipeline.

social.label: Location-Based Social Platform
social.outcome: Architected dating app for Spain's nightlife scene with geolocation matching, real-time messaging, and push notifications for a UK client.

iga.label: Multi-Tenant IGA Platform
iga.outcome: Built core backend for cloud-native identity governance platform serving Fortune 500 clients with custom ASP.NET Core Identity for NoSQL at enterprise scale.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Adjacent, Global Delivery
euAdjacent.description: CET working hours with experience across Norway, Netherlands, Germany, and beyond.

yourEngineers.title: Mogwebi wa gago, e seng mogwebi
yourEngineers.description: Dedicated team members embedded in your workflow and tools. No account managers, no ticket queues.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware to Cloud
hardwareToCloud.description: From embedded device firmware to enterprise Azure Synapse pipelines. Full-stack software across every layer.

partners.description: Ga re dirise didiriswa tseno fela — re rometse dithulaganyo tsa tlhagiso ka tsone. Go tswa go Microsoft Azure go ya go Kubernetes, baenjenere ba rona ba na le maitemogelo a mmatota.

productionProven.title: Production-Proven

faq.subtitle: Motheo wa Kitso
faq.title: <gradient>Dipotso</gradient> Tse di Bodiwang Gantsi
faq.description: Sotlhe se o tlhokang go se itse ka go dirisana le Horizon Tech

scope.question: Tiro ya gago ke efe?
scope.answer: We deliver end-to-end technology projects: custom enterprise software, AI/ML pipelines, cloud infrastructure, IoT systems, DevOps automation, and digital transformation consulting. Whether you need a full platform built from scratch or a targeted integration with your existing stack, we handle architecture, development, testing, and deployment.

stack.question: Thekenoloji ya gago ya konokono ke efe?
stack.answer: Our core stack centers on enterprise-grade platforms: Azure and AWS for cloud, .NET and Node.js for backend, React and Angular for frontend, Kubernetes and Docker for orchestration, and Terraform for infrastructure as code. Gape re dira thata le Python mo ditirong tsa AI/ML, Power BI le Fabric tsa botlhale jwa kgwebo, le PostgreSQL, SQL Server, le MongoDB ya data.

enterprise.question: O tsamaisa jang diporojeke tsa kgwebo?
enterprise.answer: Tiro nngwe le nngwe e simolola ka kgato ya tshekatsheko go tlhalosa selekanyo, kago le dikgato tse di maleba. You get a dedicated team with a technical lead, regular milestone reviews, and direct access to the engineers building your system. We follow agile sprints with stakeholder demos, maintain transparent project boards, and provide weekly progress reports.

support.question: Tshegetso ya morago ga go simolola e lebega jang?
support.answer: We offer structured support tiers with defined SLAs, including 24/7 monitoring, incident response, performance optimization, and feature iteration. Our support agreements cover bug fixes, security patches, infrastructure scaling, and proactive health checks — tailored to your uptime and response-time requirements.

integration.question: Can you connect with our existing infrastructure?
integration.answer: Ruri. We specialize in legacy modernization, API-first integrations, and hybrid cloud migrations. Whether you need to connect to on-premise ERP systems, migrate from monoliths to microservices, or bridge legacy databases with modern frontends, we have the migration playbooks and integration experience to make it seamless.

industries.question: Ke diintaseteri dife tse o di dirileng?
industries.answer: Our team has delivered projects across fintech, healthcare, logistics, e-commerce, energy, and government sectors. We understand industry-specific requirements like PCI-DSS for payments, HIPAA considerations for health data, GDPR compliance for EU markets, and real-time telemetry for industrial IoT.

engagement.question: Thulaganyo ya boitlamo e lebega jang?
engagement.answer: E simolola ka go ithuta go tlhaloganya maikaelelo a gago le maikaelelo a gago. Go tswa foo, re neelana ka tokomane ya tlhatlhobo e e nang le dikakantsho tsa kago, tatelano ya nako le go senyega ga dipeeletso tsa dipeeletso tsa dipeeletso. Fa re sena go amogelwa, re simolola ka setlhopha se se ineetseng, re tsena mo didirisiweng tsa gago le ditiro tsa gago, mme re simolole sprint ya ntlha mo malatsing a le mmalwa.

faq.stillHaveQuestions: A o sa ntse o na le dipotso?
faq.ctaDescription: A o na le porojeke mo mogopolong? A re bue ka selekanyo, nako le tekanyetsokabo.
faq.readCaseStudies: Bala dithuto tsa rona tsa Case Studies
